Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 
31 
MC_PLAN_LCTN_ID 
LABEL: 
Managed Care Plan Location Identifier 
DESCRIPTION: A field to differentiate a managed care entity’s service location. 
SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_LCTN_ID 
LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_LCTN_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
15 
FILE(S): 
APL Location 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 
VALUES: 
State-reported location identification number. The field can contain any
